recentArticles.title: Cameron Diaz and Benji Madden welcome baby No. 3: ‘We love life with our family’ - Los Angeles Times
recentArticles.snippet: # Cameron Diaz and Benji Madden welcome baby No. 3: ‘We love life with our family’. This is read by an automated voice. Cameron Diaz and Benji Madden have added one more piece to their family: another baby. “Charlie’s Angels” star Diaz, 53, and Good Charlotte co-founder Madden, 47, are now the parents to a third child, the musician announced Sunday. Madden, a “One Piece” fan and trading card enthusiast, channeled those interests to announce the arrival of Nautas. The singer-songwriter shared an illustration of a personalized trading card bearing the baby boy’s name and a grand pirate ship sailing across rocky waters — in an art style mimicking Eiichiro Oda‘s beloved and long-running pirate manga-turned-anime series. “Cameron and I are Happy, Excited, and feeling so BLESSED to announce the birth of our third Child, Nautas Madden. Singer Chris Brown and Jada Wallace are growing a family of their own, with the arrival of their baby boy.

recentArticles.title: 5 Reasons Why Michael Ruled The Box Office - SlashFilm
recentArticles.snippet: Lionsgate, director Antoine Fuqua, and Michael Jackson's estate have successfully weathered a lot of turmoil to deliver one of the biggest hits of the year so far. "Michael," a biopic covering the King of Pop's rise to superstardom, defied expectations at the box office, posting a massive global opening. We're going to look at the biggest reasons why "Michael" ruled the box office on its opening weekend. This was a movie geared towards adults, particularly those who grew up loving Michael Jackson's music. ## Few people have ever been more famous than Michael Jackson. It may seem simple, but the not-so-secret sauce when it comes to the success of "Michael" is the fact that Michael Jackson is one of the most famous people to ever walk on planet Earth. This film, in some ways, is the closest a lot of people will get to a prime Michael Jackson concert, with a side of "Behind the Music" to go with it.

recentArticles.title: Jaafar Jackson’s Used His 2026 Met Gala Look to “Push the Narrative Forward” - Vogue
recentArticles.snippet: Met Gala 2026 Red Carpet Arrivals. # Jaafar Jackson’s Used His 2026 Met Gala Look to “Push the Narrative Forward”. After coming off a whirlwind press tour for the hit biopic *Michael,* Jaafar Jackson—the singer and actor who portrays his moonwalking, single-gloved uncle in the film—is heading from one media frenzy straight into another: the 2026 Met Gala. “It was a bit last-minute for me, given everything going on with *Michael,* so I wasn’t able to start from scratch,” the 29-year-old said. “But I wanted to approach it in a way that felt true to me, of course, not just visually striking, but intentional. It didn’t feel like I was wearing a costume, it felt like an extension of me, just elevated for the moment.”. And while he wanted to make sure and honor the night’s dress code—“Fashion Is Art”—his Ralph Lauren look is, in part, a way to make him feel grounded during a chaotic moment. * See Every Look from the Met Gala 2026 Red Carpet.

recentArticles.title: NCT’s Taeyong To Release First Full-Length Album, ‘WYLD,’ On May 18 - Yahoo
recentArticles.snippet: # NCT’s Taeyong To Release First Full-Length Album, ‘WYLD,’ On May 18. NCT’s Taeyong is set to release his first full-length album, *WYLD*, on May 18, a defining moment in his solo career. With NCT’s 10th anniversary this year, Taeyong is defining his solo artist identity with *WYLD*, evolving and growing since his 2016 debut (he debuted as a solo artist in 2023). Best known as the leader of global K-pop supergroup NCT and its popular sub-unit NCT 127 (Also NCT U and SuperM), Taeyong is known for his distinct style and versatile performances. In 2024, he performed two back-to-back sold-out solo concerts, 2024  TAEYONG CONCERT, at Seoul’s Olympic Hall. NCT-127 is headlining Day 1, Friday’s MC Countdown concert, and Taeyong will perform as “Taeyong of NCT” on Saturday, Day 2, of the KCON concert at the Crypto.com Arena, alongside ZEROBASEONE, ILLIT, and P1Harmony. Fans, known as NCTzen or Czennie, can expect him to play his new album during his solo performance.

recentArticles.title: On the hunt for spring ephemerals in northern Illinois - Northern Public Radio
recentArticles.snippet: # On the hunt for spring ephemerals in northern Illinois. Northern Public Radio | By Jay Weichun. Spring ephemerals are woodland plants found throughout the Upper Midwest. Since 2022, the Forest Preserve District of Kane County has used the iNaturalist app to help educate the public on the various ephemeral species that can be found in our region. Users can upload photos to the app and help create a record of when and where the plants bloom. Gingrich says plant signage and the iNaturalist app help participants identify plants and learn about plant habitat and characteristics. "The community of users also helps with identifying plants and can suggest identifications when the original poster may have gotten it wrong.”. Users are invited to submit photos of the Kane County spring 2026 ephemerals through the app until May 31, 2026. Jay Weichun is a correspondent with WNIJ's Community Corps. See stories by Jay Weichun.

recentArticles.title: Parliament-Funkadelic, Jimmie Vaughan, Chaparelle, and Other Reviews From Austin Blues Festival - The Austin Chronicle
recentArticles.snippet: I’m so glad that they’re so open-minded to bring this music as part of Austin Blues Festival music,” he then added sincerely. ### Jimmie Vaughan and Special Guests Craft Love Letter to Blues, Soul, and Austin Music. Guest Soul Man Sam jokingly pointed out that he just turned 78 with no such recognition, then locked in the audience with Gospel-like preaching and a raucous “Let the Good Times Roll.” Tomar Williams followed, showing off on powerful renditions of the Vaughan Brothers’ “Tick Tock” and Eddie Floyd’s “Knock on Wood.” After much anticipation, Gary Clark Jr. joined the band, singing on “Oh, Pretty Woman (Can’t Make You Love Me)” and trading solos with Vaughan on “I Like It Like That” and “Wine, Wine, Wine.” The collaborative marathon set couldn’t have captured the ethos of the Austin Blues Festival any better.

recentArticles.title: Kehlani Unveils Her Most Personal Work Yet with New Self-Titled Album - When In Manila
recentArticles.snippet: 2x GRAMMY® Award-winning R&B powerhouse Kehlani released her highly anticipated self-titled fifth studio album, *KEHLANI*, on her birthday, April 24, 2026. The project captures her at her most honest, blending soul-baring storytelling with the lush, genre-bending sound that has made her one of modern R&B’s most influential voices. The album was anchored by a trio of defining singles, beginning with “Folded,” a breakout anthem that has become one of the defining R&B records of the decade. “Folded” delivered major award recognition, including 2x GRAMMY® wins for Best R&B Song and Best R&B Performance, an iHeartRadio Music Award for R&B Song of the Year (where she made her debut award show performance), NAACP Image Awards nominations, and three American Music Award nominations, including Song of the Year. Kehlani will also be honored with the Impact Award at the upcoming Billboard Women in Music, where she will deliver a special performance in celebration of her influence on music and culture.
recentArticles.summary: 美國R&B歌手Kehlani發行了她的第五張錄音室專輯《KEHLANI》，並憑藉其主打單曲獲得多項大獎。

recentArticles.title: ‘Michael’ Electrifies the Box Office: 5 Reasons Bad Reviews Couldn’t Derail the Michael Jackson Biopic - Variety
recentArticles.snippet: “Michael,” an origin story about Michael Jackson, electrified the box office with $97 million domestically and $217 million globally in its first weekend of release. Directed by Antoine Fuqua, “Michael” stars Jaafar Jackson (the singer’s nephew in his acting debut) and chronicles the performer’s journey from the Jackson 5 to his status as the King of Pop. Negative reviews and costly behind-the-scenes headaches didn’t tarnish the excitement for “Michael,” which box office watchers predict will remain a major draw into the summer season. Much like “Bohemian Rhapsody” and “Elvis,” the film about Jackson became a crowd-pleaser by leaning heavily on recreations of iconic performances of “Billie Jean,” “Thriller” and “Beat It.” Cinema-goers opted to watch those thrilling sequences on the biggest and brightest screens. The singer’s estate, a producer on the film, was encouraged by several successful productions, including the profitable Broadway musical “MJ” (one of only four new shows since the pandemic that’s still running), the Cirque du Soleil show “One” and the 2009 concert film “This Is It.” None of those projects deal with allegations against Jackson.

recentArticles.title: Jessica Alba Celebrates 45th Birthday With Kids and Danny Ramirez - Newsweek
recentArticles.snippet: # Jessica Alba Celebrates 45th Birthday With Kids and Danny Ramirez. Jessica Alba is ringing in her 45th birthday with her children and boyfriend Danny Ramirez. The actress marked the milestone with a message of gratitude alongside a series of photos shared on Instagram. In one snapshot, Alba can be seen celebrating with Ramirez, 33, and her children, Honor, 17; Haven, 14; and Hayes, 8, whom she shares with ex-husband Cash Warren. Alba shared that she is “walking into this next year with more grace, more joy, more gratitude, and a deeper love for the people who make my life mine.". “Wishing you a beautiful and blessed new year of life!” Ava DuVernay wrote while Gal Gadot shared, “Happy birthday sunshine! As for Ramirez, he shared a sweet message to Alba, who he was first spotted with in May 2025, on his Instagram Story. "Happy birthday, mi amor," he shared alongside a photo of him kissing Alba’s cheek.

recentArticles.title: Here Are the First Week Numbers for Kehlani's Self-Titled LP - Complex
recentArticles.snippet: ## It sold 69,000 album-equivalent units in its first week. Kehlani’s new self-titled album has debuted at No 4 on the *Billboard 200.*. The singer’s new project, which marks her fourth top 10-charting album on the *Billboard* 200, sold 69,000 album-equivalent units in its first week. This makes it the biggest debut from a female R&B singer this year. The project is supported by her extremely popular single, “Folded,” which won her the Grammy Awards for Best R&B Performance and Best R&B Song at this year’s ceremony. The singer previously told us about her creative process for making *Kehlani*, explaining that she recalled some emotions that she needed to work through. “I went and locked myself in the room, and I started randomly processing a bunch of things from 2020,” she revealed. The R&B singer said she's been in treatment for and it's helped her "really shift" her life around.

recentArticles.title: Kehlani Releases Self Titled Album “Kehlani” (Stream) - YouKnowIGotSoul.com
recentArticles.snippet: # Kehlani Releases Self Titled Album “Kehlani” (Stream). Two-time GRAMMY® Award winner Kehlani has released her fifth studio album, the self-titled KEHLANI. The album arrives on the heels of a massive promotional cycle anchored by the commercial juggernaut “Folded.” The single has emerged as one of the decade’s most successful R&B records, amassing over 800 million global streams and peaking at #6 on the Billboard Hot 100. The track’s 43-week chart run included 10 weeks at #1 on Urban radio and earned Kehlani two GRAMMY® Awards for Best R&B Song and Best R&B Performance. “Folded Homage Pack”: A cultural crossover project featuring reinterpretations of her hit by R&B legends including Toni Braxton, Brandy, and Ne-Yo. Beyond the studio, Kehlani has maintained a heavy cultural presence in 2026, including a surprise appearance during Giveon’s Coachella set and a performance at Revolve Festival. The self-titled album is now available worldwide on all major streaming services via Atlantic Records.

recentArticles.title: This week’s emerging and self-releasing artists - Music News
recentArticles.snippet: # This week’s emerging and self-releasing artists. Every week, Music News and Liberty Music look at the best new releases from emerging and self-releasing artists. Erica-Cody returns with ‘last man standing’, a confident pop and R&B release that explores the tension between romantic idealism and reality within modern dating. Kadri Voorand shares ‘Let Me Hold You’, a gentle and intimate release that pairs delicate piano with deeply personal vocals, offering a sense of comfort and emotional closeness. Charlie McDonald introduces his debut EP ‘Things I’ve Never Said’, a soulful and introspective release that blends pop and R&B influences into a deeply personal yet relatable listening experience. Led by the single ‘Don’t Worry’, the project captures themes of vulnerability and self-reflection, offering a message of reassurance and emotional connection. Heavy Set Woman return with ‘Highway One’, a dynamic country-rock release that blends blues, rock, and theatrical flair into a free-flowing, genre-crossing sound.

recentArticles.title: ‘Michael’ May Be ‘Family-Friendly,’ but It Taps Into Michael Jackson’s Most Powerful Creative Fuel — His Anger - Variety
recentArticles.snippet: # ‘Michael’ May Be ‘Family-Friendly,’ but It Taps Into Michael Jackson’s Most Powerful Creative Fuel — His Anger. You might think the reason it’s going to make a jillion dollars is that a lot of people are only too happy to revel in a Michael Jackson biopic that’s all greatest-hits cues and nostalgic high points: a two-hour hologram of Michael mania. The film tells a very particular story, and what that story is about is the very source of Michael Jackson’s creative power. But the underlying story that “Michael” tells, in tracing Michael’s war with his father, is the saga of Michael Jackson’s anger. We think of Michael Jackson as a “family-friendly” performer, because that’s the image he crafted for himself, and he was indeed that thing, yet he also worked in the tradition of pop musicians who expressed a volcanic wrath that had no other outlet but song.
recentArticles.summary: 這篇報導分析了麥可傑克森傳記電影《Michael》如何探討他以憤怒為創作燃料的深層原因。

recentArticles.title: R&B/Hip-Hop Fresh Picks of the Week: Durand Bernarr, Jai’Len Josey, Girlfriend & More - Billboard
recentArticles.snippet: # R&B/Hip-Hop Fresh Picks of the Week: Durand Bernarr, Jai’Len Josey, Girlfriend & More. From relationship drama to landmark album anniversaries, the worlds of R&B and hip-hop were particularly active this weekend. On Saturday (April 25), Megan Thee Stallion set social media timelines on fire when she announced that she and Dallas Mavericks shooting guard Klay Thompson were no longer together, citing infidelity and “horrible mood swings.” The former hip-hop/sports power couple began dating last year, with the rapper spending the holidays with the basketball star’s family. Kehlani, Billboard Women in Music’s Impact Award honoree, topped off a wonderful weekend for R&B with the release of her highly anticipated self-titled album. With Fresh Picks, *Billboard* aims to highlight some of the best and most interesting new sounds across R&B and hip-hop — from new Girlfriend-Jaymin duet to Durand Bernarr’s funky new single. Written by Girlfriend alongside Jaymin and Jamaal Cole II, with production from the latter, “All U Need” blends smooth R&B with honest, grounded perspectives.

recentArticles.title: Isaia Huron Is Billboard’s Up-and-Coming R&B Artist of the Month for April 2026 - Billboard
recentArticles.snippet: Released April 10 via RCA Records, *Mr. Lovebomb* stretches beyond Huron’s creative boundaries, as he lays out a 10-song story about a fictional character who doubles down on love and heartbreak with every new woman he encounters. *Billboard* spoke to April’s R&B Up and Comer of the Month, Isaia Huron, about the creation of *Mr. Lovebomb*, dating in 2026, and why he finds beauty in recording at home over a traditional studio setup. I don’t think about it like that, you know? Kanye has this song on *Watch the Throne* [called] “I Can’t Stop” where he’s like, “I heard she f–ked the doorman, well it’s cool, I f–ked the waitress” and that was in my mind and I think that’s how it kind of found its way inside of the story. I think I’m too in it to be able to say, “This is what’s new from me.” It’s coming from the same person who made the story a couple months before.

recentArticles.title: ‘Michael’ moonwalks into a big box office debut - Los Angeles Times
recentArticles.snippet: “Michael,” the Michael Jackson biopic from Lionsgate, had a massive opening weekend with a box office haul of $97 million in the U.S. and Canada. The film, which stars Jackson’s nephew, Jaafar Jackson, as the late singer, beat studio expectations of a $65 million to $70 million debut. Many noted the plot sidesteps the child sexual abuse allegations against Jackson and said the film presents a more one-dimensional view of the singer. ### ‘Michael’ drama: Which Jacksons said ‘no thanks’ and why the film cut the sexual abuse claims. “Michael” chronicles Jackson’s life through the rise of The Jackson 5 and his budding solo career before ending in 1988 while he’s on tour for his hit album, “Bad.” The film stars Colman Domingo as the late singer’s father, Joe Jackson, and Nia Long as his mother, Katherine. ### Why the new Michael Jackson biopic is on track to break box office records.

recentArticles.title: Jackson family eager to cash in after $217M opening weekend for 'Michael' - New York Post
recentArticles.snippet: # Jackson family eager to cash in after $217M opening weekend for ‘Michael’ —with talks of ‘Thriller’ tour and movie sequels. “The success of this movie didn’t just bring Michael back,” one family source told The Post. Renewed discussions about a Jackson family tour are already underway, with efforts to include Michael’s younger sister, Janet, as headliner. “[Studio] Lionsgate and the Jackson Estate haven’t made a definitive decision yet, but the family is supportive as long as the project is executed properly and the false allegations against Michael are not given excessive attention,” said a source. By most accounts, the first film already leaned heavily on Michael’s most powerful music catalog — the Jackson 5 years through his 1988 “Thriller” album. Sources say the next film is also expected to lean heavily into Michael’s personal life — including his marriages to Elvis Presley’s only daughter, Lisa Marie, and later to his nurse, Debbie Rowe, who gave birth to Michael’s oldest son, Prince, and his only daughter, Paris.

recentArticles.title: ‘Owning Manhattan' Jade Shenker Fought Dad's Guardian Over Home Before Death - TMZ
recentArticles.snippet: # ‘Owning Manhattan' Jade Shenker Fought Dad's Guardian Over Home Before Death. ## 'Owning Manhattan' Star Jade Shenker Fought Late Dad's Guardian ... According to court docs obtained by TMZ, Jade took issue with the guardian, **Bonnie Stevens**, refusing to provide her with certain financial documents related to her dad's home in New York. The guardian claimed Jade was not entitled to all the information she was seeking, but the reality star insisted she had a right to get the info and to participate in her dad's guardianship case. In court docs filed months before his death, Jade was fighting the guardian's attempt to get authorization to sell her dad's New York home, arguing that the guardian's "mismanagement of the property and failure to properly seek refinancing options created the very circumstances the guardian now claims necessitate the property's sale.". Jade believed a refinance could cover all expenses for her dad, while the guardian was seeking to sell to cover Marc's expenses and the professional fees for the guardianship.

Carlos Vives has unleashed his new studio album, *El Último Disco, Vol. 1*, a 10-track set that includes collaborations with Juan Luis Guerra, Nina Pastori, Sergio George and Josemi Carmona. It was recorded live in the studio, alongside musicians of exceptional caliber who are unafraid to sing of beautiful love and of their people.”. Crafted with the traditional rock-infused cumbia and vallenato sounds that made Vives a global powerhouse, *El Último Disco* is also charged with romantic lyrics about wooing someone like in the old days as heard in opening track “Te Dedico.”. The song also marks the final recording by Vives’ longtime and late accordionist Egidio Cuadrado, who passed away in 2024. But contrary to the album’s title, which translates to “the last album,” Vives is not going anywhere. “I have no plans to retire; on the contrary, I want to continue singing about beautiful love and for my people,” he assures.
recentArticles.summary: 此新聞報導關於拉丁歌手Carlos Vives發行新專輯並澄清無意退休，內容與周杰倫無關。

recentArticles.title: &TEAM Earn Best Sales Week As ‘We On Fire’ Moves 1.2 Million Copies - Forbes
recentArticles.snippet: After making new sales history for Japanese artists by earning one-million-plus in album sales in both Korea and Japan, &TEAM proves their selling power was no fluke with another massive haul for their latest EP. Forbes&TEAM’s Debut Korean Album Sells Over 1 Million Copies In 1 DayBy Jeff Benjamin. In a week’s time, the EP also sold nearly 1.24 million copies worldwide, surpassing &TEAM’s previous first-week sales record of 1.22 million set by the breakaway success of their debut Korean EP, *Back to Life*, released last October. Maki, &TEAM’s youngest member, also shared how “another big goal is to one day release some English songs that we can perform in front of our global fans. *The new &TEAM EP* We on Fire *is available globally now and will be released physically in the U.S. on Friday, May 15.*.
recentArticles.summary: 此新聞資訊主要報導團體&TEAM的專輯銷售佳績，與周杰倫無直接關聯。

recentArticles.title: Dame Dash Says Ye Has A Better Catalog Than Jay-Z: ‘Kanye Destroys Jay’ - billboard.com
recentArticles.snippet: # Dame Dash Says Ye Has A Better Catalog Than Jay-Z: ‘Kanye Destroys Jay’. Dame Dash sat down with *Art of Dialogue* recently to talked about a variety of topics, one being the discographies of his former business partner Jay-Z (two co-founded Roc-A-Fella with Kareem Burke in 1994) and Ye (formerly known as Kanye West.). “Kanye destroys Jay,” he continued. Jay’s not an artist…I would say Jay’s just more of a — he’s cunning, and he doesn’t mind playing with the devil.”. When asked to elaborate on what he meant by “cunning,” Dame continued by saying “[Jay-Z] will make you believe he’s your brother when he really hates you. Why you think I gave it away,” he said referring to New York State auctioning off Dash’s Roc-A-Fella Inc. shares to collect on his back taxes. ### Want to know what everyone in the music business is talking about? ### Get in the know on. Visit Billboard Pro for music business news.
recentArticles.summary: 此新聞內容與周杰倫無關，主要討論Dame Dash對Kanye West與Jay-Z音樂作品的比較。

recentArticles.title: Zayn Cancels Multiple Konnakol Tour Dates, Including Entire U.S. Leg: ‘Been at Home Recovering’ - Billboard
recentArticles.snippet: # Zayn Cancels Multiple Konnakol Tour Dates, Including Entire U.S. Leg: ‘Been at Home Recovering’. Zayn has announced major changes to his upcoming Konnakol Tour. ### Zayn Malik Reveals He’s Been Hospitalized on Day of New Album’s Release: ‘Still Unexpectedly Recovering’. ### Zayn Kicks Back With ‘Konnakol’: Stream It Now. The former One Direction announced the cancellation of 21 previously scheduled shows, including the trek’s entire U.S. leg, in an Instagram Story on Friday (May 1). “I’ve had to take another look at my schedule for the months ahead and have to reduce the number of shows on the Konnakol Tour,” he wrote. Zayn initially announced a 31-date Konnakol Tour on Feb. 5. Now, the entire U.S. leg of the tour and the first two U.K. shows have been canceled, with one rescheduled for May 24 at AO Arena in Manchester. Check out the remaining slate of dates for Zayn’s 2026 KONNAKOL tour below. ### Want to know what everyone in the music business is talking about?
recentArticles.summary: 此新聞與周杰倫無關，主要報導Zayn Malik因健康問題取消多場巡演，包括整個美國站。

recentArticles.title: Madonna & Sabrina Carpenter, Kacey Musgraves & More: Which Is Your Favorite New Music Release This Week? Vote! - Billboard
recentArticles.snippet: # Madonna & Sabrina Carpenter, Kacey Musgraves & More: Which Is Your Favorite New Music Release This Week? This week also saw saw new music from Jessie Reyez, Lizzo, Sienna Spiro and more. The pop (and country!) girls are out in full force for this New Music Friday (May 1). ### Madonna and Sabrina Carpenter, Kacey Musgraves, Zara Larsson & More: New Music Friday Guide. In addition to Gaga’s three new songs, the *Devil Wears Prada 2* soundtrack also boasts a new track from Sienna Spiro titled “Material Lover.” “Build a B—h” singer Bella Poarch also shared her new “Ribcage” single. This New Music Friday also includes new songs from Labrinth (“Prostitute”), Lizzo (“Bitch”), Bella Kay (“Promise?”), Vince Staples (“Blackberry Marmalade”), Bryson Tiller (“It’s OK”), Maroon 5 (“Heroine”), Jessie Reyez and Muni Long (“Ain’t You Tired?”), Bleachers (“I’m Not Joking”) and DaBaby, Yung Miami, YKNIECE and GloRilal (“Pop Dat Thang” remix). Vote — or share your own pick — in *Billboard*‘s New Music Friday poll below:.
recentArticles.summary: 此新聞內容主要報導本週歐美樂壇新發行音樂，未提及周杰倫相關資訊。

recentArticles.title: Madonna and Sabrina Carpenter, Kacey Musgraves, Zara Larsson & More: New Music Friday Guide - Billboard
recentArticles.snippet: # Madonna and Sabrina Carpenter, Kacey Musgraves, Zara Larsson   Kacey Musgraves releases her anticipated album *Middle of Nowhere*; and Sienna Spiro appears on the star-studded *Devil Wears Prada 2* soundtrack, which is out now… plus much more. Kacey Musgraves has said her new album was largely inspired by the Mexican community, which you can hear across its tracks — including the buzzy “Horses and Divorces.” The duet made headlines long before it arrived thanks to its unexpected feature from country icon Miranda Lambert. Released as a disc two to her 2025 album *Midnight Sun*, this girl-powered new edition features 10 fresh takes on the original 10 tracks.
